title: CompletionPrecheckOutput
description: OUTPUT of `completion_precheck`: the deterministic child-closure gate result. `run_verify` is true iff the LLM verify should run (no blocking child-closure findings); `verdict` is the deterministic FAIL completion_verdict when the precheck fails, else null; `context` is the graph-aware, fenced ticket context the verify step consumes (empty on a short-circuit).

run_verify.description: True iff the agentic verify step should run.

precheck_failed.description: True iff a child-closure finding blocks completion.

verdict.description: The deterministic FAIL completion_verdict on precheck failure, else null.

context.description: The graph-aware, fenced ticket context for the verify step (empty when the precheck short-circuits).
